Now in prison, I obviously don't have the luxury of having kids.

Tucker Carlson: Did any of those 300 employees visit you in prison?

SBF: No. I think the answer is no. One or two people may have.

Tucker Carlson: You should probably consider having some real kids at some point because they'll be there for you when things get bad.

SBF: It made me think about what real support is and the extent of intimidation in some of the systems in our country. But it also made me realize how important it is to have people you can support.

Tucker Carlson: Other people are everything. SBF, I appreciate you doing this interview, probably the only one where you're not asked about your business because that's other people's business. But I'm glad we talked about this and I hope you'll give our regards to Diddy.

SBF: I definitely will.

Tucker Carlson: I can't believe you're in the same jail as Diddy.

SBF: I know, right? If someone had told me three years ago that I'd be hanging out with Diddy every day, I would have found it hilarious. I guess he's into crypto, too?

Tucker Carlson: Life is weird. I wish you the best, and thank you. It looks like YouTube is suppressing the show. In one sense, that's not surprising, that's what they do. But in another sense, it's shocking. At a time when so much is changing in the world, in our economy and politics, on the brink of war, Google has decided that you deserve less information, not more. It's just wrong. Tomorrow, what can you do about it? We can complain, but that's a waste of time. We can't control Google. Or we can find ways around it so that you actually get real information, not deliberately misleading information.

data.title: AB DAO releases new version of NewPay, calling on 20,000 old users worldwide to receive 65 million AB
data.description:
NewPay 1.9.0 version officially released, AB ecosystem wallet upgraded

On March 7, 2025, AB DAO officially released NewPay 1.9.0 version. This update mainly includes:

NEW tokens are officially renamed AB, the assets displayed in the wallet have been switched, and the number of holdings remains unchanged.

Unlocking tokens in DAO: PoS mining has been terminated on February 1, 2025, and the relevant income settlement has been completed. Please unlock the tokens in DAO as soon as possible.

The Android terminal has pushed the update. Google Play users please back up your wallet and go to the official website to download it: https://ab.org/en/abwallet.

The iOS version has been submitted for review and will be updated after the App Store passes.

At the same time, AB DAO launched a global call to call 21,989 BEP2 NEW token holders to claim 65 million AB (original NEW, worth about 1 million US dollars), complete the cross-chain conversion, and join the AB ecosystem.

Global call to solve the BEP2 NEW-09E asset legacy issue

AB DAO issued BEP2 token NEW-09E on BNB Beacon Chain in the early days, but some users failed to complete the cross-chain in time before the BNB Beacon Chain was closed, resulting in 65,335,749.375 NEW still remaining on the chain.

To help users recover their assets and successfully redeem $AB, AB DAO had in-depth communication with the Binance technical team and referred to the BNB Beacon Chain Token Recovery Tool solution to finally determine this cross-chain recall plan to ensure that user assets are smoothly converted into AB.

Recall details:

Total AB to be claimed: 65,335,749.37

Total number of affected coin holders: 21,989

User distribution:

1,000,000 NEW and above: 8 addresses

100,000 NEW and above: 142 addresses

10,000 NEW and above: 725 addresses

1,000 NEW and above: 1,395 addresses

Check if your address is involved: href="https://explorer.bnbchain.org/asset/holders/NEW-09E" _src="https://explorer.bnbchain.org/asset/holders/NEW-09E">https://explorer.bnbchain.org/asset/holders/NEW-09E

NEW-09E cross-chain New - AB exchange process only takes 5 steps

1. Visit the cross-chain conversion page: https://new-09e-recover.ab.org, click "Connect Wallet" to connect the wallet.

2. Enter the NEW format address compatible with the AB chain.

3. Click "Confirm Receiver Address & Next" and sign the transaction in the wallet.

4. Wait for the system to confirm the recovery (about 7 days),

5. AB tokens will be automatically issued to your receiving address.

Important Notes

a. Only BNB Chain Wallet and Trust Wallet Extension are supported. Trust Wallet App and other wallets must be imported to BNB Chain Wallet or Trust Wallet Extension before operation

b. Only users holding ≥101 NEW can perform cross-chain conversion.

c. Cross-chain handling fee: 100 NEW.

d. This cross-chain will convert all users' NEW-09E to AB (Formerly NEW) at one time. Please make sure that the NEW address is correct.

AB DAO ecosystem continues to expand

Currently users can trade $AB on the following exchanges:

· Bitget (bitget.com)

· MEXC (mexc.com)

· BingX (bingx.com)

· HTX (htx.com)

· 4E (eeee.com)

· Hotcoin (hotcoin.com)（Coming soon）

· BitMart (bitmart.com)（Coming soon）

AB DAO will continue to list on multiple exchanges in the near future to enrich ecological application scenarios and accelerate global development.

Please continue to pay attention to AB DAO for more updates

· Official Website: https://ab.org

· Telegram Community: https://t.me/Newtonproject

· Telegram Channel: https://t.me/AB202528

· X (Twitter): https://x.com/ABDAO_Global

· Discord: https://discord.gg/BSbgK6J
